scenarios.title: signs in with valid credentials @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to /login via loginPage.open(), fill email + password with valid credentials, click Sign in, expect dashboard greeting to be visible and contain the full welcome phrase.
expectedAssertions: dashboard greeting element is visible after submit
greeting text matches /welcome back, jane/i (full phrase + user identity)

scenarios.title: rejects an invalid password @negative
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to /login via loginPage.open(), fill valid email + wrong password, click Sign in, expect error banner with invalid-credentials text and URL to remain on /login.
expectedAssertions: URL still matches /\/login/ after submit (no redirect to dashboard)

locatorTable.notes: PageClass field: inputEmail. Assumes <label for='email'> exists. Fallback: page.locator('#email'). See pin 1.
PageClass field: inputPassword. Same assumption as email. Fallback: page.locator('#password'). See pin 2.
PageClass field: buttonSignIn. Probably <button> or <input type=submit>. Could be <a> or <div>. Fallback: page.getByText('Sign in', { exact: true }). See pin 3.
PageClass field: textDashboardGreeting. No DOM evidence for semantic role. CSS class retained. Request data-testid='dashboard-greeting'. See pin 4.
PageClass field: alertErrorBanner. Login error banners commonly use role=alert. Fallback: page.locator('.error-banner'). See pin 5.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: label association for #email not confirmed — getByLabel assumed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect DOM for <label for='email'>. If absent, switch to page.locator('#email') or getByPlaceholder(/email/i).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: label association for #password not confirmed — getByLabel assumed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Same investigation as pin 1. Fallback: page.locator('#password').

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved: button role not confirmed — element may not be native <button>
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to confirm element type. If not a <button>, keep page.getByText('Sign in', { exact: true }).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q4 unresolved: greeting element role unknown — CSS class retained pending DOM evidence
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Request data-testid='dashboard-greeting' from FE team. If heading role confirmed, upgrade to getByRole('heading', { name: /welcome back/i }).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: alert role not confirmed on .error-banner
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask team to add role='alert' to the error banner component. Fallback: page.locator('.error-banner').
